problem_text_cn:
## 七、(25分)

空间有匀强磁场，磁感应强度$\boldsymbol{B}$的方向如图1所示.在与$\boldsymbol{B}$垂直的平面上设置$Oxy$坐标框架，图中$k$是未画出的$z$坐标轴的方向矢量. $t=0$时刻，质量$m$、电量$q>0$的质点位于$x=0$，$y=\frac{l}{2}$处，质量也为$m$、电量为$-q$的质点位于$x=0$，$y=-\frac{l}{2}$处，两质点用一根长为$l$的轻杆连接着. $t=0$时，系统质心$C$静止，轻杆带着两个质点绕$C$点在$Oxy$平面上沿顺时针方向，以初始角速度$\omega_{0}$旋转.除磁场力外，不存在其他外作用力.

为杆引入顺时针旋转为正方向的转角$\phi$，为过程态引入质心速度$v_{c}$沿$q$到$-q$方向的分速度$v_{c\phi}$和垂直于杆沿图2所示方向的分速度$v_{c\bot}$.

(1) 将转角为$\phi$时杆旋转角速度$\omega$和质心的分速度$v_{c\phi}$均设成已给的参量，试求此时质心加速度的两个分量$a_{c_{x}}$，$a_{c_{y}}$和杆的旋转角加速度$\beta$.

(2) 将$\phi$随时间$t$变化的函数记为$\phi(t)$.

(2.1) 导出关于$\phi(t)$的微分方程，方程中只可包含$m$，$q$，$B$参量；

(2.2) 导出$\omega^{2}$随$\phi$变化的函数表述式，式中只可包含$m$，$q$，$B$和$\omega_{0}$，$\phi$参量；

(2.3) 分析判定系统能否达到$\omega$为非零常量的稳定运动状态？

(3) 假设杆可连续不停地旋转.

(3.1) 确定$\omega_{0}$取值范围；

(3.2) 导出$y_{c}$取值范围.

(4) 设$m\gg qB/\omega_{0}$，$\omega_{0}$取值可使杆连续不停地旋转，试近似地导出质心$C$的运动轨道.

(5) 试问$\omega_{0}$在何范围内取值，可使$|\phi|_{\max}$为小角度，并导出此种情况下质心坐标$x_{c}$，$y_{c}$随时间$t$变化的函数.
problem_text_en:
## Seven. (25 points)

There is a uniform magnetic field in space. The direction of the magnetic induction $\boldsymbol{B}$ is shown in Figure 1. In the plane perpendicular to $\boldsymbol{B}$, an $Oxy$ coordinate frame is set. The vector $k$ (not drawn) indicates the direction of the $z$‑axis. At $t=0$, a particle of mass $m$ and charge $q>0$ is located at $x=0$, $y=\frac{l}{2}$, and another particle of mass $m$ and charge $-q$ is located at $x=0$, $y=-\frac{l}{2}$. The two particles are connected by a light rod of length $l$. At $t=0$, the center of mass $C$ of the system is at rest, and the rod together with the two particles rotates clockwise around $C$ in the $Oxy$ plane with an initial angular velocity $\omega_{0}$. Apart from the magnetic force, no other external forces act.

Let $\phi$ be the rotation angle, taken positive for clockwise rotation. For the process state, introduce the component $v_{c\phi}$ of the center‑of‑mass velocity along the direction from $q$ to $-q$, and the component $v_{c\bot}$ perpendicular to the rod as shown in Figure 2.

(1) Given the rod’s angular velocity $\omega$ and the center‑of‑mass component $v_{c\phi}$ at rotation angle $\phi$, determine the two components $a_{c_{x}}$, $a_{c_{y}}$ of the center‑of‑mass acceleration and the rotational angular acceleration $\beta$ of the rod.

(2) Denote the function $\phi(t)$ describing the time variation of $\phi$.

(2.1) Derive the differential equation for $\phi(t)$, which may contain only the parameters $m$, $q$, $B$.

(2.2) Derive the expression for $\omega^{2}$ as a function of $\phi$, which may contain only $m$, $q$, $B$, $\omega_{0}$, and $\phi$.

(2.3) Analyze and decide whether the system can reach a steady motion state with $\omega$ being a nonzero constant.

(3) Assume the rod can rotate continuously without stopping.

(3.1) Determine the range of $\omega_{0}$.

(3.2) Derive the range of $y_{c}$.

(4) Suppose $m\gg qB/\omega_{0}$ and $\omega_{0}$ is such that the rod rotates continuously. Derive an approximate expression for the trajectory of the center of mass $C$.

(5) Within what range of $\omega_{0}$ is $|\phi|_{\max}$ a small angle? For such a case, derive the functions $x_{c}(t)$ and $y_{c}(t)$.
problem_solution_cn:
(1) 运动学量: $v_{c}=v_{c\parallel}+v_{c\perp}$，$\omega=-\omega k$.

系统受磁场力:
$v_{c\parallel}$对应的两个质点所受磁场力：$\begin{cases}\text{合力为零，}\\\text{相对质心力矩之和}M=qBlv_{c\parallel}k.\end{cases}$
$v_{c\perp}$对应的两个质点所受磁场力：$\begin{cases}\text{合力为零，}\\\text{相对质心力矩之和为零.}\end{cases}$
$\omega$对应的两个质点所受磁场力：$\begin{cases}\text{合力}F_{\omega}:\text{方向沿}q\text{到}-q\text{为正方向，大小}F_{\omega}=qBl\omega,\\\text{相对质心力矩之和为零.}\end{cases}$

得
$$a_{c}=\frac{F_{\omega}}{2m}\begin{cases} \text{方向：沿}q\text{到}-q\text{为正方向，} \\ \text{大小：}a_{c}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\omega, \end{cases}\quad a_{c\omega}=-a_{c}\sin\phi=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\omega\sin\phi,$$

由
$$M=I_{c}\beta,\quad M=qBlv_{c\parallel}k,\quad I_{c}=2\times m\left(\frac{l}{2}\right)^{2}=\frac{1}{2}ml^{2}$$
得
$$\beta=\frac{2qB}{ml}v_{c\parallel}k.\quad \text{(5分)}$$

将$v_{C_{x}}\sim\phi$，$v_{C_{y}}\sim\phi$表述式代入前面所得$v_{C//}\sim v_{C_{x}}$，$v_{C_{y}}$关系式，得
$$v_{C//}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\sin\phi\quad(=-v_{C_{y}}).$$
(类似可得$v_{C_{\perp}}=\frac{qBl}{2m}(1-\cos\phi)=-v_{C_{x}}$)由
$$\beta=\frac{2qB}{ml}v_{C//}\,k,\,v_{C//}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\sin\phi,\,\phi\text{旋转正方向与}\,k\,\text{反向},$$
得
$$\frac{d^{2}\phi}{dt^{2}}=-\beta=-\frac{2qBqBl}{ml}\sin\phi=-\frac{q^{2}B^{2}}{m^{2}}\sin\phi,$$
所求关于$\phi(t)$的微分方程即为
$$\ddot{\phi}+\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}\sin\phi=0.\quad(4\text{分})$$

(2.2) 将
$$\ddot{\phi}=\frac{d\omega}{dt}=\frac{d\omega}{d\phi}\frac{d\phi}{dt}=\omega\frac{d\omega}{d\phi}$$
代入上式，得
$$\int_{\omega_{0}}^{\omega}\omega\mathrm{d}\omega=-\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}\int_{0}^{\phi}\sin\phi\mathrm{d}\phi,$$
$\omega^{2}$随$\phi$的变化的函数即为
$$\omega^{2}=\omega_{0}^{2}-2\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}(1-\cos\phi).\quad(2\text{分})$$

(2.3) 系统若能达到$\omega$为非零常量的稳定状态，则由上式要求此后$\phi$为不变量，于是必有
$$\omega=\frac{\mathrm{d}\phi}{\mathrm{d}t}=0,$$
与$\omega$为非零常量矛盾，据此，系统不可能达到$\omega$为非零常量的稳定运动状态. (1分)
(附注:某些参考书中的例题认为系统有可能达到$\omega$为非零常量的稳定运动状态，似有不妥.)

(3.1) 由(2.2)问解答可知，为使杆可连续不停地旋转，要求$\phi$取任意值均对应$\omega^{2}>0$，即得$\omega_{0}$取值范围为
$$\omega_{0}>2\frac{qB}{m}.\quad(1\text{分})$$

(3.2) 由
$$v_{C_{y}}=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\sin\phi,\quad\ddot{\phi}+\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}\sin\phi=0,\Rightarrow\sin\phi=-\left(\frac{m}{qB}\right)^{2}\ddot{\phi}=-\left(\frac{m}{qB}\right)^{2}\frac{\mathrm{d}\omega}{\mathrm{d}t},$$
得
$$\frac{\mathrm{d}y_{c}}{\mathrm{~d}t}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\left(\frac{m}{qB}\right)^{2}\frac{\mathrm{d}\omega}{\mathrm{d}t}=\frac{ml}{2qB}\frac{\mathrm{d}\omega}{\mathrm{d}t},\quad\Rightarrow\int_{0}^{y_{c}}\mathrm{~d}y_{c}=\frac{ml}{2qB}\int_{\omega_{0}}^{\omega}\mathrm{d}\omega,$$
$$\Rightarrow\quad y_{c}=-\frac{ml}{2qB}\left(\omega_{0}-\omega\right).$$
杆连续不停旋转过程中，$\omega$恒为正，由(2.2)问解答可得到
$$\omega_{\max}=\omega_{0},\quad\omega_{\min}=\sqrt{\omega_{0}^{2}-4\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}},$$
故$y_{c}$取值范围为
$$0\geqslant y_{c}\geqslant-\frac{ml}{2qB}\left(\omega_{0}-\sqrt{\omega_{0}^{2}-4\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}}\right).\quad(3\text{分})$$
(附注:此处所得$y_{c}$取值范围与第2届亚洲赛理论试题2的(2.b)问解答一致，该题一$x$方向即为本题一$y$方向.)

(4) 由
$$\omega^{2}=\omega_{0}^{2}-2\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}(1-\cos\phi),\quad\frac{qB}{m}\ll\omega_{0}$$
得
$$\omega\approx\omega_{0},\quad\phi=\omega_{0} t,$$
则有
$$\frac{\mathrm{d} x_{C}}{\mathrm{~d} t}=v_{Cx}=\frac{qBl}{2m}(\cos\phi-1)=\frac{qBl}{2m}(\cos\omega_{0} t-1),$$
$$\Rightarrow\int_{0}^{x_{C}}\mathrm{~d} x_{C}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\frac{1}{\omega_{0}}\left[\int_{0}^{\phi}\cos\phi\mathrm{d}\phi-\int_{0}^{\phi}\mathrm{d}\phi\right],$$
得
$$x_{C}=\frac{q Bl}{2m\omega_{0}}(\sin\phi-\phi).$$
由
$$\frac{\mathrm{d} y_{C}}{\mathrm{~d} t}=v_{Cy}=-\frac{q Bl}{2m}\sin\phi=-\frac{q Bl}{2m}\sin\omega_{0} t,\quad\Rightarrow \int_{0}^{y_{C}} \mathrm{~d} y_{C}=-\frac{q Bl}{2 m \omega_{0}} \int_{0}^{\phi} \sin \phi \mathrm{d} \phi,$$
得
$$y_{C}=\frac{q Bl}{2 m \omega_{0}}(\cos \phi-1).$$
质心轨道的参量方程可表述为
$$\left\{\begin{array}{l}
x_{C}=R\sin\phi-R\phi,\\
y_{C}=R\cos\phi-R,\end{array}\right.\quad R=\frac{qBl}{2 m \omega_{0}}.\quad(4\text{分})$$
轨道是一条滚轮线，如题解图2所示.
(附注：此种情况下质心$C$的运动轨道与《物理学难题集萃》（舒幼生、胡望雨、陈秉乾编著，高等教育出版社，1999年)1149页题4中的质心$C$的运动轨道相同.)

(5) $|\phi|_{\max}$为小角度，则
$$\sin\phi\approx\phi,\quad\Rightarrow\quad\ddot{\phi}+\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}\phi=0,$$
得解
$$\phi=\phi_{0}\sin\frac{qB}{m}t,$$
$$\omega_{0}=\left.\frac{\mathrm{d}\phi}{\mathrm{d} t}\right|_{t=0}=\left.\frac{qB}{m}\phi_{0}\cos\frac{qB}{m}t\right|_{t=0}=\frac{qB}{m}\phi_{0},$$
$$\Rightarrow|\phi|_{\max}=\phi_{0}=m\omega_{0}/qB.$$
为使$|\phi|_{\max}=\phi_{0}$为小角度，要求$\omega_{0}$取值范围为
$$\omega_{0}\ll \frac{qB}{m}.$$
此时因$\phi$为小角度，有
$$\frac{\mathrm{d} x_{C}}{\mathrm{~d} t}=v_{Cx}=\frac{q Bl}{2 m}(\cos \phi-1)=\frac{q Bl}{2 m}\left(-\frac{\phi^{2}}{2}\right)=-\frac{q B l}{4 m} \phi_{0}^{2} \sin ^{2}\left(\frac{q B}{m} t\right),$$
$$\Rightarrow\frac{\mathrm{d} x_{C}}{\mathrm{~d} t}=-\frac{q B l}{4 m} \phi_{0}^{2}\frac{1}{2}\left(1-\cos \frac{2 q B}{m} t\right),$$
$$\Rightarrow\int_{0}^{x_{C}} \mathrm{~d} x_{C}=-\frac{q B l}{8 m} \phi_{0}^{2}\left[\int_{0}^{t} \mathrm{~d} t-\int_{0}^{t} \cos \frac{2 q B}{m} t \,\mathrm{d} t\right],$$
得
$$x_{c}=\frac{qBl}{8m}\phi_{0}^{2}\left(\frac{m}{2qB}\sin\frac{2qB}{m}t-t\right).$$
又有
$$\frac{\mathrm{d}y_{c}}{\mathrm{~d}t}=v_{c_{y}}=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\sin\phi=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\phi=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\phi_{0}\sin\frac{qB}{m}t,$$
$$\Rightarrow\int_{0}^{y_{c}}\mathrm{~d} y_{c}=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\phi_{0}\int_{0}^{t}\sin\frac{qB}{m}t\,\mathrm{d} t,$$
得
$$y_{c}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\phi_{0}\frac{m}{qB}\left(\cos\frac{qB}{m}t-1\right).$$
即
$$\left\{\begin{array}{l}
x_{c}=\frac{l\phi_{0}^{2}}{16}\left(\sin\frac{2qB}{m}t-\frac{2qB}{m}t\right), \\
y_{c}=\frac{l\phi_{0}}{2}\left(\cos\frac{qB}{m}t-1\right),\end{array}\right.\quad \begin{cases}t \to \infty \text{ 时, } x_{c} \to -\infty, \\ 0> y_{c}>-l\phi_{0}, \phi_{0}=m\omega_{0} / q B .\end{cases}\quad(5\text{分})$$
problem_solution_en:
(1) Kinematic quantities: $v_{c}=v_{c\parallel}+v_{c\perp}$, $\omega=-\omega k$.

Magnetic forces on the system:
Forces due to $v_{c\parallel}$: $\begin{cases}\text{net force zero,}\\ \text{total moment about C: }M=qBlv_{c\parallel}k.\end{cases}$
Forces due to $v_{c\perp}$: $\begin{cases}\text{net force zero,}\\ \text{total moment about C: zero.}\end{cases}$
Forces due to $\omega$: $\begin{cases}\text{net force }F_{\omega}:\text{direction from }q\text{ to }-q\text{ (positive), magnitude }F_{\omega}=qBl\omega,\\ \text{total moment about C: zero.}\end{cases}$

Hence
$$a_{c}=\frac{F_{\omega}}{2m}\begin{cases} \text{direction: from }q\text{ to }-q\text{ (positive),} \\ \text{magnitude: }a_{c}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\omega, \end{cases}\quad a_{c\omega}=-a_{c}\sin\phi=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\omega\sin\phi,$$

From
$$M=I_{c}\beta,\quad M=qBlv_{c\parallel}k,\quad I_{c}=2\times m\left(\frac{l}{2}\right)^{2}=\frac{1}{2}ml^{2}$$
we obtain
$$\beta=\frac{2qB}{ml}v_{c\parallel}k.\quad(5\text{ points})$$

Substituting the expressions for $v_{C_{x}}\sim\phi$, $v_{C_{y}}\sim\phi$ into the relations obtained earlier for $v_{C//}\sim v_{C_{x}}$, $v_{C_{y}}$ gives
$$v_{C//}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\sin\phi\quad(=-v_{C_{y}}).$$
(Similarly $v_{C_{\perp}}=\frac{qBl}{2m}(1-\cos\phi)=-v_{C_{x}}$.) From
$$\beta=\frac{2qB}{ml}v_{C//}\,k,\,v_{C//}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\sin\phi,\,\phi\text{ positive rotation direction opposite to }k,$$
we have
$$\frac{d^{2}\phi}{dt^{2}}=-\beta=-\frac{2qBqBl}{ml}\sin\phi=-\frac{q^{2}B^{2}}{m^{2}}\sin\phi,$$
so the differential equation for $\phi(t)$ is
$$\ddot{\phi}+\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}\sin\phi=0.\quad(4\text{ points})$$

(2.2) Using
$$\ddot{\phi}=\frac{d\omega}{dt}=\frac{d\omega}{d\phi}\frac{d\phi}{dt}=\omega\frac{d\omega}{d\phi}$$
and substituting into the above yields
$$\int_{\omega_{0}}^{\omega}\omega\,d\omega=-\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}\int_{0}^{\phi}\sin\phi\,d\phi,$$
hence the function for $\omega^{2}$ versus $\phi$ is
$$\omega^{2}=\omega_{0}^{2}-2\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}(1-\cos\phi).\quad(2\text{ points})$$

(2.3) If the system could reach a steady state with $\omega$ a nonzero constant, then from the above $\phi$ would have to be constant, which would imply
$$\omega=\frac{d\phi}{dt}=0,$$
contradicting the assumption that $\omega$ is a nonzero constant. Therefore, the system cannot reach a steady motion state with $\omega$ a nonzero constant. (1 point)
(Note: Some textbooks’ examples suggest the possibility of such a steady state, which seems inappropriate.)

(3.1) From the result of (2.2), for the rod to rotate continuously without stopping we require $\omega^{2}>0$ for all $\phi$, giving the range of $\omega_{0}$ as
$$\omega_{0}>2\frac{qB}{m}.\quad(1\text{ point})$$

(3.2) From
$$v_{C_{y}}=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\sin\phi,\quad\ddot{\phi}+\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}\sin\phi=0,\Rightarrow\sin\phi=-\left(\frac{m}{qB}\right)^{2}\ddot{\phi}=-\left(\frac{m}{qB}\right)^{2}\frac{d\omega}{dt},$$
we get
$$\frac{dy_{c}}{dt}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\left(\frac{m}{qB}\right)^{2}\frac{d\omega}{dt}=\frac{ml}{2qB}\frac{d\omega}{dt},\quad\Rightarrow\int_{0}^{y_{c}}dy_{c}=\frac{ml}{2qB}\int_{\omega_{0}}^{\omega}d\omega,$$
$$\Rightarrow y_{c}=-\frac{ml}{2qB}\left(\omega_{0}-\omega\right).$$
During continuous rotation, $\omega$ is always positive. From (2.2) we have
$$\omega_{\max}=\omega_{0},\quad\omega_{\min}=\sqrt{\omega_{0}^{2}-4\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}},$$
so the range of $y_{c}$ is
$$0\ge y_{c}\ge-\frac{ml}{2qB}\left(\omega_{0}-\sqrt{\omega_{0}^{2}-4\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}}\right).\quad(3\text{ points})$$
(Note: This range for $y_{c}$ agrees with the answer to sub‑question (2.b) of Problem 2 in the 2nd Asian Physics Olympiad theoretical exam; the $x$‑direction there corresponds to the $y$‑direction here.)

(4) From
$$\omega^{2}=\omega_{0}^{2}-2\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}(1-\cos\phi),\quad\frac{qB}{m}\ll\omega_{0}$$
we have
$$\omega\approx\omega_{0},\quad\phi=\omega_{0} t,$$
hence
$$\frac{d x_{C}}{d t}=v_{Cx}=\frac{qBl}{2m}(\cos\phi-1)=\frac{qBl}{2m}(\cos\omega_{0} t-1),$$
$$\Rightarrow\int_{0}^{x_{C}}d x_{C}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\frac{1}{\omega_{0}}\left[\int_{0}^{\phi}\cos\phi\,d\phi-\int_{0}^{\phi}d\phi\right],$$
$$\Rightarrow x_{C}=\frac{q Bl}{2m\omega_{0}}(\sin\phi-\phi).$$
From
$$\frac{d y_{C}}{d t}=v_{Cy}=-\frac{q Bl}{2m}\sin\phi=-\frac{q Bl}{2m}\sin\omega_{0} t,\quad\Rightarrow \int_{0}^{y_{C}} d y_{C}=-\frac{q Bl}{2 m \omega_{0}} \int_{0}^{\phi} \sin \phi \,d\phi,$$
$$\Rightarrow y_{C}=\frac{q Bl}{2 m \omega_{0}}(\cos \phi-1).$$
The parametric equations of the center‑of‑mass trajectory are
$$\left\{\begin{array}{l}
x_{C}=R\sin\phi-R\phi,\\
y_{C}=R\cos\phi-R,\end{array}\right.\quad R=\frac{qBl}{2 m \omega_{0}}.\quad(4\text{ points})$$
The trajectory is a cycloid, as shown in solution diagram 2.
(Note: In this case, the trajectory of the center of mass $C$ is the same as that in Problem 4 on p.1149 of “Collection of Challenging Physics Problems” (Shu Yusheng, Hu Wangyu, Chen Bingqian, Higher Education Press, 1999).)

(5) For $|\phi|_{\max}$ to be a small angle, we take
$$\sin\phi\approx\phi,\quad\Rightarrow\quad\ddot{\phi}+\left(\frac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}\phi=0,$$
with solution
$$\phi=\phi_{0}\sin\frac{qB}{m}t,$$
$$\omega_{0}=\left.\frac{d\phi}{dt}\right|_{t=0}=\left.\frac{qB}{m}\phi_{0}\cos\frac{qB}{m}t\right|_{t=0}=\frac{qB}{m}\phi_{0},$$
$$\Rightarrow|\phi|_{\max}=\phi_{0}=m\omega_{0}/qB.$$
For $|\phi|_{\max}=\phi_{0}$ to be a small angle, $\omega_{0}$ must satisfy
$$\omega_{0}\ll \frac{qB}{m}.$$
Since $\phi$ is small,
$$\frac{d x_{C}}{d t}=v_{Cx}=\frac{q Bl}{2 m}(\cos \phi-1)=\frac{q Bl}{2 m}\left(-\frac{\phi^{2}}{2}\right)=-\frac{q B l}{4 m} \phi_{0}^{2} \sin ^{2}\left(\frac{q B}{m} t\right),$$
$$\Rightarrow\frac{d x_{C}}{d t}=-\frac{q B l}{4 m} \phi_{0}^{2}\frac{1}{2}\left(1-\cos \frac{2 q B}{m} t\right),$$
$$\Rightarrow\int_{0}^{x_{C}} d x_{C}=-\frac{q B l}{8 m} \phi_{0}^{2}\left[\int_{0}^{t} d t-\int_{0}^{t} \cos \frac{2 q B}{m} t \,dt\right],$$
hence
$$x_{c}=\frac{qBl}{8m}\phi_{0}^{2}\left(\frac{m}{2qB}\sin\frac{2qB}{m}t-t\right).$$
Also,
$$\frac{dy_{c}}{dt}=v_{c_{y}}=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\sin\phi=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\phi=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\phi_{0}\sin\frac{qB}{m}t,$$
$$\Rightarrow\int_{0}^{y_{c}}d y_{c}=-\frac{qBl}{2m}\phi_{0}\int_{0}^{t}\sin\frac{qB}{m}t\,dt,$$
$$\Rightarrow y_{c}=\frac{qBl}{2m}\phi_{0}\frac{m}{qB}\left(\cos\frac{qB}{m}t-1\right).$$
Thus
$$\left\{\begin{array}{l}
x_{c}=\frac{l\phi_{0}^{2}}{16}\left(\sin\frac{2qB}{m}t-\frac{2qB}{m}t\right), \\
y_{c}=\frac{l\phi_{0}}{2}\left(\cos\frac{qB}{m}t-1\right),\end{array}\right.\quad \begin{cases}t \to \infty \text{ 时, } x_{c} \to -\infty, \\ 0> y_{c}>-l\phi_{0}, \phi_{0}=m\omega_{0} / q B .\end{cases}\quad(5\text{ points})$$
img_cn: 图1：匀强磁场$\boldsymbol{B}$方向垂直纸面向里，$Oxy$平面与$\boldsymbol{B}$垂直。$t=0$时，质量$m$、电量$q>0$的质点在$x=0$，$y=\frac{l}{2}$；质量$m$、电量$-q$的质点在$x=0$，$y=-\frac{l}{2}$。两质点用长为$l$的轻杆连接，杆绕质心$C$顺时针以$\omega_0$旋转。
图2：以质心$C$为原点，建立旋转坐标系。$x$轴与$\boldsymbol{B}$垂直，$y$轴与$\boldsymbol{B}$平行，$z$轴垂直纸面向外。设顺时针转角为$\phi$，质心速度$v_c$在沿$q$到$-q$方向的分量为$v_{c\phi}$，垂直于杆的分量为$v_{c\bot}$。
图片呈现了一道物理题的解答过程。题目涉及运动学量和磁场力分析，有公式推导、矢量关系图示。图中展示了质心速度分量关系及推导公式，包含三角函数运算和积分过程，还有对$M=I\beta$等物理量关系的应用，图示有坐标系、矢量箭头及标注。
图片展示了一段关于质心轨道参数方程的数学推导过程。上方为推导公式，包含对坐标的微分与积分运算。下方为轨道示意图，标记了质心$C$的位置，以及由$R\sin\phi$和$R\cos\phi$组成的坐标关系，图中标注了$-R\phi$、$-R$等关键位置。
一张包含复杂数学物理推导的图片，主要内容是关于带电粒子在磁场中运动的坐标计算。
img_en: Figure 1: The uniform magnetic field $\boldsymbol{B}$ is directed into the page; the $Oxy$ plane is perpendicular to $\boldsymbol{B}$. At $t=0$, a particle of mass $m$, charge $q>0$ is at $x=0$, $y=\frac{l}{2}$; a particle of mass $m$, charge $-q$ is at $x=0$, $y=-\frac{l}{2}$. The two particles are connected by a light rod of length $l$, rotating clockwise about the center of mass $C$ with angular velocity $\omega_0$.

Figure 2: A rotating coordinate system is set with the center of mass $C$ as origin. The $x$‑axis is perpendicular to $\boldsymbol{B}$, the $y$‑axis is parallel to $\boldsymbol{B}$, and the $z$‑axis points out of the page. Let $\phi$ be the clockwise rotation angle. The center‑of‑mass velocity $v_c$ has component $v_{c\phi}$ along the direction from $q$ to $-q$ and component $v_{c\bot}$ perpendicular to the rod.

The picture shows the solution process of a physics problem. It involves kinematic quantities and magnetic‑field force analysis, with formula derivations and vector‑relationship diagrams. The figure illustrates the relationship between the components of the center‑of‑mass velocity and the derivation formulas, including trigonometric function operations and integration processes. There are also applications of physical quantity relationships such as $M=I\beta$, with a coordinate system, vector arrows, and labels.

The image presents a mathematical derivation of the parametric equations for the center‑of‑mass orbit. Above are the derivation formulas involving differential and integral operations on coordinates. Below is a schematic diagram of the orbit, marking the position of the center of mass $C$ and coordinate relationships composed of $R\sin\phi$ and $R\cos\phi$. Key positions such as $-R\phi$ and $-R$ are labeled.
A complex mathematical‑physics derivation image, focusing on the coordinate calculations of a charged particle moving in a magnetic field.
problem_answer:
(1) $a_{c_{x}}=-\dfrac{qBl}{2m}\omega\sin\phi$，$a_{c_{y}}=\dfrac{qBl}{2m}\omega\cos\phi$，$\beta=\dfrac{2qB}{ml}v_{c\parallel}k$。
(2.1) $\ddot{\phi}+\left(\dfrac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}\sin\phi=0$。
(2.2) $\omega^{2}=\omega_{0}^{2}-2\left(\dfrac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}(1-\cos\phi)$。
(2.3) 不能。
(3.1) $\omega_{0}>\dfrac{2qB}{m}$。
(3.2) $0\geqslant y_{c}\geqslant-\dfrac{ml}{2qB}\left(\omega_{0}-\sqrt{\omega_{0}^{2}-4\left(\dfrac{qB}{m}\right)^{2}}\right)$。
(4) 轨道参量方程：$\begin{cases}x_{C}=R\sin\phi-R\phi,\\ y_{C}=R\cos\phi-R,\end{cases}$ 其中 $R=\dfrac{qBl}{2m\omega_{0}}$。
(5) 当 $\omega_{0}\ll\dfrac{qB}{m}$ 时，$|\phi|_{\max}$ 为小角度。此时 $\begin{cases}x_{c}=\dfrac{l\phi_{0}^{2}}{16}\left(\sin\dfrac{2qB}{m}t-\dfrac{2qB}{m}t\right),\\ y_{c}=\dfrac{l\phi_{0}}{2}\left(\cos\dfrac{qB}{m}t-1\right),\end{cases}$ 其中 $\phi_{0}=m\omega_{0}/qB$。
